project.name: Puheo
project.description: AI-powered Spanish YO-koe (matriculation exam) prep platform for Finnish high school students. Lyhyt oppimäärä.
project.primary_target_users: Finnish high school students preparing for the Spanish ylioppilaskirjoitukset

frontend_loops_required.ui_ux_pro_max: .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md - open before any UI work and keep open through the whole loop. Covers a11y, focus, motion, contrast, touch targets, font-pairings.
frontend_loops_required.taste_frontend_primary: design:taste-frontend - PRIMARY for any frontend revamp. Use it on the 21st.dev candidates AND on the final implementation. If installed, it is mandatory.
frontend_loops_required.taste_frontend_fallback: If design:taste-frontend is not installed, fall back to design:design-critique + ui-ux-pro-max combo per AGENT_PROMPT_STANDARDS.md section 2.
additional: design:design-critique - required after sourcing pass and on the final result, even if taste-frontend was used
design:ux-copy - for any new microcopy / labels / CTAs
design:accessibility-review - required before marking the loop complete
design:design-system - when adding a new token or component

sourcing_rule.rule: Before writing the first HTML tag or CSS class for any new UI component, browse 21st.dev/s/<term> with 3-5 relevant search terms. This is mandatory, not optional. Screenshot 2-3 candidates, pick the most restrained dark option, port React+Tailwind to vanilla CSS using existing tokens, cite exact URL in IMPROVEMENTS.md.
sourcing_rule.exceptions: Trivial extensions of existing Puheo components (e.g. expanding a 3-card grid to 8-card) do not require a new sourcing pass. New patterns (modal, segmented-control, accordion, stepper) always require sourcing.
sourcing_rule.taste_frontend_integration: If design:taste-frontend is available, run it on the 21st.dev candidate set and let it pick the restrained option.

guardrails.do_not_invent_facts: No fake reviews, partner schools, or numbers not present in lib/curriculumData.js or BUGS.md.

BUGS.md::P0.exit_criteria: Bug verified fixed by re-running the audit command in BUGS.md header.

BUGS.md::P1.exit_criteria: axe-core sweep passes on affected screens at 1440 + 375.

BUGS.md::P2.exit_criteria: Polish only - ship if loop has slack.

audits.deliverable: Update BUGS.md with new findings, do not auto-fix critical security issues without human review.

ci_repair.exit_criteria: main branch goes green; no email spam to user.

stop_conditions: Lighthouse score < 90 on landing or app dashboard
npm audit reports any high/critical vulnerability
verify_before_marking_complete: axe-core 0 violations on changed screens at 1440 + 375
design:taste-frontend applied if installed, fallback design:design-critique + ui-ux-pro-max
21st.dev sourcing pass cited with exact URL in IMPROVEMENTS.md (any new UI component)

documentation_size_limits.AGENT_STATE.md: max 50 lines, archive oldest to docs/archive/AGENT_STATE_HISTORY.md
documentation_size_limits.IMPROVEMENTS.md: max 100 lines, archive oldest to docs/archive/

fallback_when_ruflo_unavailable.rationale: If Ruflo cannot be installed or the user prefers Claude Code direct, the fallback prompt orchestrates the same loops via subagents.
